content:
🚀 Now ready to execute Version 7.8. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 7.9 – Locking in Archetype, Faction, Party, Secret Alignments & Further Refinements


🚀 This iteration finalizes the multi-layered identity system (Archetype, Faction, Party, Secret Alignment), confirms external influence on skill checks, and establishes item and role limitations.

📜 1. Multi-Layered Identity System – The Four Player Identities

📜 Each player will now exist within four interwoven systems.

✔ 1️⃣ Archetype (The Avatar & Role in the Narrative)
• This is their fundamental persona and skillset.
• Includes fixed abilities, buffs, and debuffs.
• Defines their dice roll mechanics & special abilities.

✔ 2️⃣ Faction (Belief System & Ideological Identity)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 461 (chunk 461/555)
